# Bird's Blossoms

Bird's Blossoms is an online flower delivery store offering fresh, hand-arranged bouquets and floral arrangements delivered directly to customers' doors across the continental United States.

## What We Sell

We offer a wide selection of fresh flowers including:
- Classic rose bouquets (red, pink, white, mixed)
- Seasonal wildflower arrangements
- Sunflower bouquets
- Mixed spring bouquets
- Single-stem flowers for custom arrangements
- Gift flower sets with vases and cards

Our flowers are sourced daily from local and regional growers. Every bouquet is guaranteed to stay fresh for at least 7 days with proper care.

## Service Area

We deliver throughout the continental United States. Same-day delivery is available for orders placed before 12:00 PM local time in select major cities. Standard delivery takes 1-3 business days.

## How to Order

1. Browse our catalog at birdsbouquets.com/products
2. Add flowers to your cart
3. Enter a shipping address at checkout (no account required)
4. Pay securely with a credit card via Stripe
5. Receive order confirmation by email
6. Track your order at birdsbouquets.com/orders/lookup using your email and order number

## Pricing

Bouquets start at $24.99. Free shipping on orders over $75. Standard shipping is $8.99.

## Return & Refund Policy

If your flowers arrive damaged or don't meet expectations, contact us within 24 hours of delivery with your order number and a photo. We'll offer a full refund or free replacement — your choice.

## Contact

- Website: https://birdsbouquets.com
- Contact form: https://birdsbouquets.com/contact
- Email: hello@birdsbouquets.com

## About Bird's Blossoms

Bird's Blossoms was founded to make beautiful fresh flowers accessible to everyone. We work directly with growers to eliminate middlemen and bring quality blooms at honest prices.
